services.name: Hospital General Universitario de Alicante (HGUA)
services.notes: Major public hospital, 24/7 emergency (Urgencias), some English-speaking doctors

services.notes: Central location on the main promenade, English spoken, extended hours

services.notes: Large Spanish supermarket chain, affordable, Mon-Sat 9:00-21:30

services.notes: Major Spanish bank, English-speaking staff, ATM network, expat accounts

services.name: Centro de Salud Plaza de América
services.notes: Public health center, SIP card required, appointments via GVA salud app

services.notes: 24-hour veterinary hospital, emergency services, English spoken

services.notes: Large park with dedicated off-leash dog area, shaded zones

services.name: Virgin Active Alicante
services.notes: Premium gym with pool, spa, group classes, English-speaking trainers

services.name: St. Nicholas Anglican Church Alicante
services.notes: English-language services, large British expat congregation on the Costa Blanca

services.name: Alicante Expats Community Center
services.notes: Active expat groups, English-language social events, newcomer support

attractions.name: Castillo de Santa Bárbara
attractions.description: Medieval fortress on Mount Benacantil with panoramic city and sea views
attractions.frequency: Open daily, free elevator access from Postiguet beach

attractions.name: Playa del Postiguet
attractions.description: Central city beach with Blue Flag status, golden sand, calm waters

attractions.name: MARQ - Museo Arqueológico de Alicante
attractions.description: Award-winning archaeological museum covering prehistoric to modern eras

attractions.name: Mercado Central de Alicante
attractions.description: Modernist central market with fresh seafood, produce, and tapas bars

attractions.name: Isla de Tabarca
attractions.description: Protected marine reserve island reachable by ferry, snorkeling and seafood

attractions.name: Explanada de España
attractions.description: Iconic mosaic-tiled promenade along the harbor, evening paseo culture

attractions.name: Centro Comercial Panoramis
attractions.description: Waterfront shopping and entertainment center at the port

attractions.name: Parque Natural de las Lagunas de la Mata y Torrevieja
attractions.description: Salt lake nature reserve with flamingos and hiking trails
attractions.frequency: Day trip, best Nov-Mar for flamingos

attractions.name: Hogueras de San Juan Festival
attractions.description: Alicante's major festival with bonfires, fireworks, parades in June

attractions.name: Real Club de Regatas de Alicante
attractions.description: Yacht club and sailing center at the port, sailing courses available
